models.title: 40 Watt - Clear - Incandescent A15 Appliance Bulb - Medium Base - 130 Volt - PLTS-12111
750 Lumens - 9 Watt - 3000 Kelvin - LED A19 Light Bulb - 60 Watt Equal - GU24 Base - 120 Volt - PLT-11382
800 Lumens - 9 Watt - LED A19 Light Bulb with 5 Selectable Color Temperatures - Kelvin 2700-3000-3500-4000-5000 - 60 Watt Equal - Medium Base - 120 Volt - PLT-12651
PSX24W LED Fanless Headlight/Fog Light Conversion Kit with Internal Drivers - 4,000 Lumens/Set - Cool White
models.category: LED Headlight & Fog Light Bulbs > Miniature > Cars, Trucks, and SUVs
source_fields:
Increase your safety and visibility with this PSX24W LED headlight/fog light kit. The single-intensity LED headlight bulbs emit 4,000 lumens of cool white illumination per set (2,000 lumens each) and feature 3rd generation cooling technology. They have integrated heat sinks instead of short-lived fans or bulky braided heat sinks. This allows for a longer-lasting bulb and easier installation in tight spaces. They also have internal drivers, which eliminates the need to mount an additional part and locate an appropriate mounting spot. The compact bulbs last 13 times longer than halogen bulbs. LED arrays in each bulb are designed to mimic the filament in halogen bulbs—creating a closely matched beam style. These waterproof, CAN Bus compatible bulbs operate with in a wide 9-32 VDC range. This long-lasting kit includes 2 LED headlight bulbs and 2 adapter plugs. Price per kit.

Application Note: LED bulbs are legal in the USA for Fog Light use but not compliant with DOT / FMVSS108 in the USA for Headlights. Legal for off-road and powersport applications. This restriction applies universally to all LED bulbs for use in halogen headlight housings in the USA, regardless of brand or marketing claims.

models.title: Vapor Tight LED Jelly Jar Light - Caged Ceiling Light - Selectable Wattage and CCT - up to 2,990 Lumens - 26W / 20W / 13W - 3,000K / 4,000K / 5,000K
source_fields:
The vapor-tight LED jelly jar light has a rugged, gray powder-coated die-cast aluminum housing and cage that protects the heavy-duty, frosted glass lens. Built for harsh environments inside or out, the caged fixture has selectable color temperature and wattage via switches inside the housing. This ceiling-mount cage light has a maximum output of 2,990 lumens and an IP65 rating making it ideal for general outdoor use. Surface mount using the built-in junction box, which has threaded holes for conduit, four with plugs on the sides and one open on the top, providing multiple options for wiring.

Product Details:

  • Powder-coated aluminum housing and cage, frosted glass lens
  • IP65 waterproof
  • Beam angle: 140° x 360°
  • Surface mount
  • 4 kV surge protection
  • 120–277 VAC
  • Certified by UL
  • 5-year warranty

models.title: Adjustable Surface Mount for EPLL2 series Explosion Proof Light - Wall or Ceiling Mount - EPLL2-CM
source_fields: EPLL2 series Surface Mount is a low-profile installation solution for compatible series Linear Explosion Proof Light. The rugged construction with stands the same tough environments as the light fixture. Includes 4 masonry anchors and mounting hardware.

models.title: 52 in. Ceiling Fan - Color Selectable LED Light Kit and Remote Included - 800 Lumens - 53 Watt - Kelvin 3000-4000-5700 - (3) 24 in. Reversible Walnut Blades - White Finish - 120 Volt - Energetic Lighting CFAN-DC3B52-WH
Spitfire Brushed Brass 60" Ceiling Fan Motor, Blades Sold Separately
source_fields:
Fanimation Spitfire 60'' Ceiling Fan — Brushed Satin BrassThe Fanimation MA6721BBS is a 60'' ceiling fan featuring a sleek design in a Brushed Satin Brass finish. It includes three blades and an AC motor, making it suitable for damp locations. This fan is designed for optimal performance with a maximum airflow of 4908 CFM.Key Features

Blade Span: 60'' diameter

Number of Blades: 3

Motor Type: AC Motor

Environment Rating: Damp Location

Control Options: TR500 hand-held remote control included

Downrod Included: 4.5'' downrod

Sloped Ceiling Compatible: Up to 19°

Optional Controls: Wall and Wi-Fi controls available

Lighting Options: Compatible with LK6721B LED light kit

Airflow Efficiency: 71 CFM/W on high speed
Construction & DesignThis fan features a durable construction with a 21° blade pitch and a stylish Brushed Satin Brass finish, making it a perfect addition to any modern space.Advanced Control FeaturesThe fan comes with a TR500 hand-held remote control offering variable fan speeds and infinite light levels. Optional wall controls and Wi-Fi receiver units are available for enhanced control.Electrical & InstallationDesigned for 120V AC, this fan is compatible with sloped ceilings up to 19° and includes a 4.5'' downrod. Additional downrod lengths are available for customized installations.Fan PerformanceWith a maximum airflow of 4908 CFM, this fan is ideal for large spaces over 400 sq ft, providing efficient air circulation.What's Included
TR500 hand-held remote control
4.5'' downrod
Installation instructions
